_comment: This file is INTERNAL DOCUMENTATION + the source of truth for ops/apply_railway_service_config.py. Railway itself reads `build.buildCommand` on every build, but it does NOT support per-service nested deploy blocks (the schema is flat). cronSchedule, restartPolicyType, and source.repo all live at the service-instance level and have to be applied via the GraphQL API. Run `python ops/apply_railway_service_config.py --all` after any change to this file.
